faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Westbury typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the size of the infestation, the number of colonies present, and the square footage of your property. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Westbury home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windowsills, faint rustling sounds in walls, and seeing large black ants especially during spring evenings. Westbury's older homes are particularly susceptible near wooden porches, window frames, and areas with moisture damage.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ants common in Westbury, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, carpenter ants are very common in Westbury due to the abundance of mature trees, older wooden structures, and humid conditions typical of Long Island. They're especially active from March through October and are attracted to moisture-damaged wood in basements, attics, and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and next-day service to Westbury residents. Most treatments are completed in one visit, though severe infestations may require follow-up treatments. We provide a warranty on all carpenter ant services and will return at no charge if activity persists.
